{{infobox football tournament season
|title                      = Copa do Brasil
|year                       = 2024
|country                    = Brazil
|dates                      = {{nowrap|20 February – 10 November}}
|num_teams                  = 92
|champions                  = [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]] {{small|(5th title)}}
|runner-up                  = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
|continentalcup1            = [[2025 Copa Libertadores]]
|continentalcup1 qualifiers = Flamengo
|matches                    = 122
|goals                      = 263
|scoring_leader             = [[Pablo Vegetti]] (7 goals)
|prev_season                = [[2023 Copa do Brasil|2023]]
|next_season                = [[2025 Copa do Brasil|2025]]
|player=[[Giorgian de Arrascaeta]]|goalkeeper=[[Agustín Rossi (footballer)]]}}

The '''2024 Copa do Brasil''' (officially the '''Copa Betano do Brasil 2024''' for sponsorship reasons)<ref>{{Cite web |last=Esporte |first=Redação Máquina do |date=2022-12-01 |title=EXCLUSIVO: Betano terá title sponsor da Copa do Brasil até 2025 |url=https://maquinadoesporte.com.br/futebol/exclusivo-betano-tera-title-sponsor-da-copa-do-brasil-ate-2025/ |access-date=2024-01-01 |website=Máquina do Esporte |language=pt-BR}}</ref> was the 36th edition of Brazil's [[domestic cup]], the [[Copa do Brasil]]. It was being held from 20 February to 10 November 2024.<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |date=2023-12-04 |title=Times da Copa do Brasil 2024: veja lista de todos os participantes |url=https://ge.globo.com/pi/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2023/12/04/copa-do-brasil-2024-vitoria-do-athletico-confirma-todos-os-participantes-veja-lista.ghtml |access-date=2024-01-01 |website=ge |language=pt-br |archive-date=2023-12-13 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231213122757/https://ge.globo.com/pi/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2023/12/04/copa-do-brasil-2024-vitoria-do-athletico-confirma-todos-os-participantes-veja-lista.ghtml |url-status=live }}</ref> [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] were the defending champions but they were eliminated in the quarter-finals.

Unlike previous editions, this edition did not automatically grant berths based on the [[CBF ranking|national club ranking]]; instead, of the 92 available berths, 80 were distributed between the [[State football leagues in Brazil|state leagues]], with the remaining 12 being allocated to the teams qualified for the [[2024 Copa Libertadores|Copa Libertadores]], the champions of regional cups [[2024 Copa Verde|Copa Verde]] and [[Copa do Nordeste]], the champion of the second division [[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|Série B]], and any remaining berths going to non-qualified clubs in [[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|Série A]].<ref>{{Cite web |date=2022-12-26 |title=CBF muda critérios de classificação para Copa do Brasil de 2024 e fortalece federações; entenda |url=https://ge.globo.com/pe/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2022/12/26/cbf-muda-criterios-de-classificacao-para-copa-do-brasil-de-2024-e-fortalece-federacoes.ghtml |access-date=2024-01-01 |website=ge |language=pt-br |archive-date=2023-10-22 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231022041126/https://ge.globo.com/pe/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2022/12/26/cbf-muda-criterios-de-classificacao-para-copa-do-brasil-de-2024-e-fortalece-federacoes.ghtml |url-status=live }}</ref>

In their third consecutive final, [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]] defeated [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] to win their fifth title. As champions, Flamengo qualified for the [[2025 Copa Libertadores]] group stage and the [[2025 Supercopa do Brasil]].<ref>{{Cite web |date=10 November 2024 |title=Flamengo é campeão da Copa Betano do Brasil |url=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/detalhes/competicoes-copa-brasil-masculino/flamengo-conquista-a-copa-betano-do-brasil |url-status=live |access-date=10 November 2024 |website=Confederação Brasileira de Futebol |language=pt-br |archive-date=10 November 2024 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20241110214235/https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/detalhes/competicoes-copa-brasil-masculino/flamengo-conquista-a-copa-betano-do-brasil }}</ref>

== Qualified teams ==
Each state league received a number of berths based on their [[CBF ranking#2024 State Ranking|state ranking]]. The states chose how to distribute those berths between league placements and state cup champions. Teams in '''bold''' enter the competition in the third round.<ref name=":0" />
{| class="wikitable"
!Association
!Team
!Qualification method
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Acre}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco-AC]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Acreano]] champions
|-
|[[Sport Clube Humaitá|Humaitá]]
|2023 Campeonato Acreano runners-up
|-
| rowspan="3" |{{Flag|Alagoas}}<br><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Alagoano]] champions
|-
|[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]]
|2023 Campeonato Alagoano runners-up
|-
|[[Murici Futebol Clube|Murici]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Alagoano#2024 Copa do Brasil play-off|2023 Campeonato Alagoano play-off]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Amapá}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Trem Desportivo Clube|Trem]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Amapaense]] champions
|-
|[[Independente Esporte Clube|Independente-AP]]
|2023 Campeonato Amapaense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Amazonas}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Amazonas Futebol Clube|Amazonas]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Amazonense]] champions
|-
|[[Manauara Esporte Clube|Manauara]]
|2023 Campeonato Amazonense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="4" |{{Flag|Bahia}}<br><small>3 + 1 berths</small>
|'''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]'''
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|2023 Série B]] champions'''
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Baiano]] champions
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Jacuipense|Jacuipense]]
|2023 Campeonato Baiano runners-up
|-
|[[Itabuna Esporte Clube|Itabuna]]
|2023 Campeonato Baiano 3rd place
|-
| rowspan="4" |{{Flag|Ceará}}<br><small>3 + 1 berths</small>
|[[Ceará Sporting Club|'''Ceará''']]
|'''[[2023 Copa do Nordeste]] champions'''
|-
|[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Cearense]] champions
|-
|[[Associação Desportiva Iguatu|Iguatu]]
|2023 Campeonato Cearense runners-up
|-
|[[Ferroviário Atlético Clube (CE)|Ferroviário]]
|2023 [[Copa Fares Lopes]] champions
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Distrito Federal}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Real Brasília FC|Real Brasília]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Brasiliense]] champions
|-
|[[Brasiliense FC|Brasiliense]]
|2023 Campeonato Brasiliense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Espírito Santo}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Capixaba]] champions
|-
|[[Nova Venécia Futebol Clube|Nova Venécia]]
|2023 Campeonato Capixaba runners-up
|-
| rowspan="4" |{{Flag|Goiás}}<br><small>3 + 1 berths</small>
|[[Goiás Esporte Clube|'''Goiás''']]
|'''[[2023 Copa Verde]] champions'''
|-
|[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Goiano]] champions
|-
|[[Associação Atlética Aparecidense|Aparecidense]]
|2023 Campeonato Goiano 3rd place
|-
|[[Anápolis Futebol Clube|Anápolis]]
|2023 Campeonato Goiano 4th place
|-
| rowspan="3" |{{Flag|Maranhão}}<br><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Maranhão Atlético Clube|Maranhão]]
|2023 [[Campeonato Maranhense]] champions
|-
|[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club]]
|2023 Campeonato Maranhense runners-up
|-
|[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]]
|2023 Campeonato Maranhense 3rd place
|-
| rowspan="3" |{{Flag|Mato Grosso}}<br><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Cuiabá Esporte Clube|Cuiabá]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|[[União Esporte Clube|União Rondonópolis]]
|2023 Campeonato Mato-Grossense runners-up
|-
|[[CE Operário Várzea-Grandense|CEOV]]
|2023 [[Copa FMF]] 3rd place
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Mato Grosso do Sul}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Costa Rica Esporte Clube|Costa Rica]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário-MS]]
|2023 Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="6" |{{Flag|Minas Gerais}}<br><small>5 + 1 berths</small>
|[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|'''Atlético Mineiro''']]
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] 3rd place'''
|-
|[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Mineiro]] runners-up
|-
|[[Athletic Club (MG)|Athletic]]
|2023 Campeonato Mineiro 3rd place
|-
|[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]
|2023 Campeonato Mineiro 4th place
|-
|[[Villa Nova Atlético Clube|Villa Nova]]
|2023 Campeonato Mineiro 5th place
|-
|[[Tombense Futebol Clube|Tombense]]
|2023 [[Troféu Inconfidência]] champions
|-
| rowspan="3" |{{Flag|Pará}}<br><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Águia de Marabá Futebol Clube|Águia de Marabá]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Paraense]] champions
|-
|[[Clube do Remo|Remo]]
|2023 Campeonato Paraense runners-up
|-
|[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]
|2023 Campeonato Paraense 3rd place
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Paraíba}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Paraibano]] champions
|-
|[[Sousa Esporte Clube|Sousa]]
|2023 Campeonato Paraibano runners-up
|-
| rowspan="6" |{{Flag|Paraná}}<br><small>5 + 1 berths</small>
|[[Club Athletico Paranaense|'''Athletico Paranaense''']]
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] 8th place'''
|-
|[[FC Cascavel]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Paranaense]] runners-up
|-
|[[Operário Ferroviário Esporte Clube|Operário Ferroviário]]
|2023 Campeonato Paranaense 3rd place
|-
|[[Maringá Futebol Clube|Maringá]]
|2023 Campeonato Paranaense 4th place
|-
|[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
|2023 Campeonato Paranaense 5th place
|-
|[[Cianorte Futebol Clube|Cianorte]]
|2023 Campeonato Paranaense 6th place
|-
| rowspan="3" |{{Flag|Pernambuco}}<br><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Pernambucano]] champions
|-
|[[Retrô Futebol Clube Brasil|Retrô]]
|2023 Campeonato Pernambucano runners-up
|-
|[[Petrolina Social Futebol Clube|Petrolina]]
|2023 Campeonato Pernambucano 3rd place
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Piauí}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[River Atlético Clube|River-PI]]
|2023 [[Campeonato Piauiense]] champions
|-
|[[Fluminense Esporte Clube|Fluminense-PI]]
|2023 Campeonato Piauiense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="9" |{{Flag|Rio de Janeiro}}<br><small>6 + 2 + 1 berths</small>
|[[Fluminense FC|'''Fluminense''']]
|'''[[2023 Copa Libertadores]] champions'''
|-
|[[CR Flamengo|'''Flamengo''']]
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] 4th place'''
|-
|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|'''Botafogo''']]
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] 5th place'''
|-
|[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Carioca]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Volta Redonda FC|Volta Redonda]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Carioca]] 4th place
|-
|[[Audax Rio de Janeiro Esporte Clube|Audax Rio]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Carioca]] 6th place
|-
|[[Nova Iguaçu FC|Nova Iguaçu]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Carioca]] 7th place
|-
|[[Associação Atlética Portuguesa (RJ)|Portuguesa-RJ]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Carioca]] 8th place
|-
|[[Olaria Atlético Clube|Olaria]]
|2023 [[Copa Rio (state cup)|Copa Rio]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Rio Grande do Norte}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]]
|2023 [[Campeonato Potiguar]] champions
|-
|[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]
|2023 Campeonato Potiguar runners-up
|-
| rowspan="6" |{{Flag|Rio Grande do Sul}}<br><small>5 + 1 berths</small>
|'''[[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]'''
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] runners-up'''
|-
|[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Gaúcho]] runners-up
|-
|[[SC Internacional|Internacional]]
|2023 Campeonato Gaúcho 3rd place
|-
|[[Ypiranga Futebol Clube|Ypiranga]]
|2023 Campeonato Gaúcho 4th place
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
|2023 Campeonato Gaúcho 5th place
|-
|[[Esporte Clube São Luiz|São Luiz]]
|2023 [[Copa FGF]] champions
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Rondônia}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Porto Velho Esporte Clube|Porto Velho]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Rondoniense]] champions
|-
|[[Ji-Paraná Futebol Clube|Ji-Paraná]]
|2023 Campeonato Rondoniense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Roraima}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (RR)|São Raimundo-RR]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Roraimense]] champions
|-
|[[Grêmio Atlético Sampaio|GAS]]
|2023 Campeonato Roraimense runners-up
|-
| rowspan="3" |{{Flag|Santa Catarina}}<br><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Catarinense]] champions
|-
|[[Brusque Futebol Clube|Brusque]]
|2023 Campeonato Catarinense runners-up
|-
|[[Clube Náutico Marcílio Dias|Marcílio Dias]]
|2023 [[Copa Santa Catarina]] champions
|-
| rowspan="9" |{{Flag|São Paulo}}<br><small>6 + 2 + 1 berths</small>
|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''
|'''[[2023 Copa do Brasil]] champions'''
|-
|'''[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] champions'''
|-
|'''[[Red Bull Bragantino]]'''
|'''[[2023 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2023 Série A]] 6th place'''
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Água Santa|Água Santa]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Paulista]] runners-up
|-
|[[Ituano FC|Ituano]]
|2023 Campeonato Paulista 3rd place
|-
|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|2023 Campeonato Paulista 7th place
|-
|[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (SP)|Botafogo-SP]]
|2023 Campeonato Paulista 8th place
|-
|[[São Bernardo Futebol Clube|São Bernardo]]
|2023 Taça Independência champions
|-
|[[Associação Atlética Portuguesa (Santos)|Portuguesa Santista]]
|2023 [[Copa Paulista]] champions
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Sergipe}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana]]
|2023 [[Campeonato Sergipano]] champions
|-
|[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]]
|2023 Campeonato Sergipano runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" |{{Flag|Tocantins}}<br><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Tocantinópolis Esporte Clube|Tocantinópolis]]
|[[2023 Campeonato Tocantinense]] champions
|-
|[[Capital Futebol Clube|Capital]]
|2023 Campeonato Tocantinense runners-up
|}

== Schedule ==
On 31 October 2023, [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]] published the 2024 Copa do Brasil schedule:<ref>{{Cite web |title=Campeonato Brasileiro 2024 terá pela primeira vez jogo de abertura |url=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/index/campeonato-brasileiro-2024-tera-pela-primeira-vez-jogo-de-abertura |access-date=2024-01-01 |website=Confederação Brasileira de Futebol |language=pt-BR |archive-date=2023-11-18 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231118230805/https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/index/campeonato-brasileiro-2024-tera-pela-primeira-vez-jogo-de-abertura |url-status=live }}</ref>
{| class="wikitable"
|+Single-legged rounds
!Stage
! colspan="2" |Week 1
!Week 2
|-
|First round
| colspan="2" |21 February
|28 February
|-
|Second round
| colspan="2" |6 March
|13 March
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|+Two-legged rounds
!Stage
!First leg
!Second leg
|-
|Third round
|1 May
|22 May
|-
|Round of 16
|31 July
|7 August
|-
|Quarter-finals
|28 August
|11 September
|-
|Semi-finals
|2 October
|16 October
|-
|Finals
|3 November
|10 November
|}

==Draw==
{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil first round|Draw}}
{{clear}}

==First round==
{{main|2024 Copa do Brasil first round}}
{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil first round|Format}}
{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil first round|First round}}

==Second round==
{{main|2024 Copa do Brasil second round}}

{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil second round|Format}}
{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil second round|Second round}}

==Third round==
{{main|2024 Copa do Brasil third round}}

{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil third round|Draw}}
{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil third round|Format}}
{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil third round|Third round}}

==Final rounds==
{{main|2024 Copa do Brasil final rounds}}
<!--{{#lst:2024 Copa do Brasil final rounds|Format}}-->

===Bracket===
<section begin=Bracket />
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n|nowrap=y
| team-width = 180
| RD1 = [[#Round of 16|Round of 16]]
| RD2 = [[#Quarter-finals|Quarter-finals]]
| RD3 = [[#Semi-finals|Semi-finals]]
| RD4 = [[#Finals|Finals]]

| RD1-team01      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
| RD1-score01-1   = 1
| RD1-score01-2   = 0
| RD1-score01-agg = 1
| RD1-team02      = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''
| RD1-score02-1   = 1
| RD1-score02-2   = 1
| RD1-score02-agg = 2

| RD1-team03      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD1-score03-1   = 2
| RD1-score03-2   = 0
| RD1-score03-agg = 2
| RD1-team04      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
| RD1-score04-1   = 0
| RD1-score04-2   = 1
| RD1-score04-agg = 1

| RD1-team05      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]'''
| RD1-score05-1   = 3
| RD1-score05-2   = 2
| RD1-score05-agg = 5
| RD1-team06      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]
| RD1-score06-1   = 2
| RD1-score06-2   = 2
| RD1-score06-agg = 4

| RD1-team07      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]''' {{pso}}
| RD1-score07-1   = 0
| RD1-score07-2   = 0
| RD1-score07-agg = 0 {{small|(3)}}
| RD1-team08      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]
| RD1-score08-1   = 0
| RD1-score08-2   = 0
| RD1-score08-agg = 0 {{small|(1)}}

| RD1-team09      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''
| RD1-score09-1   = 2
| RD1-score09-2   = 0
| RD1-score09-agg = 2
| RD1-team10      = {{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
| RD1-score10-1   = 0
| RD1-score10-2   = 0
| RD1-score10-agg = 0

| RD1-team11      = {{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]
| RD1-score11-1   = 2
| RD1-score11-2   = 0
| RD1-score11-agg = 2
| RD1-team12      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD1-score12-1   = 2
| RD1-score12-2   = 3
| RD1-score12-agg = 5

| RD1-team13      = {{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]
| RD1-score13-1   = 1
| RD1-score13-2   = 0
| RD1-score13-agg = 1
| RD1-team14      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
| RD1-score14-1   = 1
| RD1-score14-2   = 1
| RD1-score14-agg = 2

| RD1-team15      = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]'''
| RD1-score15-1   = 2
| RD1-score15-2   = 3
| RD1-score15-agg = 5
| RD1-team16      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Red Bull Bragantino]]
| RD1-score16-1   = 0
| RD1-score16-2   = 2
| RD1-score16-agg = 2

| RD2-team01      = {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
| RD2-score01-1   = 0
| RD2-score01-2   = 0
| RD2-score01-agg = 0
| RD2-team02      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD2-score02-1   = 1
| RD2-score02-2   = 1
| RD2-score02-agg = 2

| RD2-team03      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
| RD2-score03-1   = 2
| RD2-score03-2   = 1
| RD2-score03-agg = 3
| RD2-team04      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''
| RD2-score04-1   = 1
| RD2-score04-2   = 3
| RD2-score04-agg = 4

| RD2-team05      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
| RD2-score05-1   = 0
| RD2-score05-2   = 0
| RD2-score05-agg = 0
| RD2-team06      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD2-score06-1   = 1
| RD2-score06-2   = 0
| RD2-score06-agg = 1

| RD2-team07      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]''' {{pso}}
| RD2-score07-1   = 2
| RD2-score07-2   = 1
| RD2-score07-agg = 3 {{small|(5)}}
| RD2-team08      = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]
| RD2-score08-1   = 1
| RD2-score08-2   = 2
| RD2-score08-agg = 3 {{small|(4)}}

| RD3-team01      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD3-score01-1   = 1
| RD3-score01-2   = 0
| RD3-score01-agg = 1
| RD3-team02      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
| RD3-score02-1   = 0
| RD3-score02-2   = 0
| RD3-score02-agg = 0

| RD3-team03      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD3-score03-1   = 2
| RD3-score03-2   = 1
| RD3-score03-agg = 3
| RD3-team04      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
| RD3-score04-1   = 1
| RD3-score04-2   = 1
| RD3-score04-agg = 2

| RD4-team01      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD4-score01-1   = 3
| RD4-score01-2   = 1 
| RD4-score01-agg = 4 
| RD4-team02      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD4-score02-1   = 1
| RD4-score02-2   = 0 
| RD4-score02-agg = 1 
}}<section end="Bracket" />

===Round of 16===
The draw for the round of 16 was held on 18 July at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{cite web |title=Oitavas de final da Copa do Brasil 2024: veja confrontos e mandos de campo |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/07/18/oitavas-de-final-da-copa-do-brasil-2024-veja-confrontos.ghtml |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |access-date=19 August 2024 |language=pt-br |date=18 July 2024 |archive-date=18 July 2024 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20240718195854/https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/07/18/oitavas-de-final-da-copa-do-brasil-2024-veja-confrontos.ghtml |url-status=live }}</ref>
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''| |2–1|[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]| |2–0|0–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]| |1–2|'''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''| |1–1|0–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]'''| |5–2|[[Red Bull Bragantino]]| |2–0|3–2}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''| |2–0|[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]| |2–0|0–0}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]| |2–5|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''| |2–2|0–3}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]| |1–2|'''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''| |1–1|0–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''| |0–0 {{pso|3–1}}|[[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]| |0–0|0–0}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]'''| |5–4|[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]| |3–2|2–2}}
|}

===Quarter-finals===
The draw for the quarter-finals was held on 20 August at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{cite web |title=Copa do Brasil 2024: veja jogos das quartas até a final |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/08/20/copa-do-brasil-2024-veja-jogos-das-quartas-ate-a-final.ghtml |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |language=pt-br |date=20 August 2024 |access-date=24 August 2024 |archive-date=22 August 2024 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20240822100525/https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/08/20/copa-do-brasil-2024-veja-jogos-das-quartas-ate-a-final.ghtml |url-status=live }}</ref>
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''||3–3 {{pso|5–4}}|[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]||2–1|1–2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]||0–1|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''||0–1|0–0}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]||0–2|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''||0–1|0–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]||3–4|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''||2–1|1–3}}
|}

===Semi-finals===
The draw for the semi-finals was held on 20 September at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2024-09-18 |title=Sorteio dos mandos das semis da Copa do Brasil 2024: veja data e horário |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/09/18/sorteio-dos-mandos-das-semis-da-copa-do-brasil-2024-veja-data-e-horario.ghtml |access-date=2024-10-12 |website=ge |language=pt-br |archive-date=2024-09-19 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20240919080500/https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/09/18/sorteio-dos-mandos-das-semis-da-copa-do-brasil-2024-veja-data-e-horario.ghtml |url-status=live }}</ref> Owing to requests from Flamengo and Atlético Mineiro due to the [[FIFA International Match Calendar|FIFA Calendar]], the dates of the second leg matches were changed from 17 to 19 and 20 October.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Jogada10 |first=Redação |date=2024-10-11 |title=SJTD nega pedidos e mantém datas da semi da Copa do Brasil |url=https://www.correiobraziliense.com.br/esportes/2024/10/6962862-sjtd-nega-pedidos-e-mantem-datas-da-semi-da-copa-do-brasil.html |access-date=2024-10-12 |website=Esportes |language=pt-BR}}</ref>{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''||3–2|[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]||2–1|1–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''||1–0|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]||1–0|0–0}}
|}

=== Finals ===
{{main|2024 Copa do Brasil finals}}

The draw for the finals was held on 24 October at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2024-10-24 |title=CBF define mandos de campo da final da Copa do Brasil entre Flamengo x Atlético-MG |url=https://www.espn.com.br/futebol/copa-do-brasil/artigo/_/id/14350177/flamengo-x-atletico-mg-final-copa-brasil-cbf-define-mandos-campo |access-date=2024-10-24 |website=ESPN.com |language=pt}}</ref>
{{Football box
| date = {{Start date|2024|11|3|df=y}}
| time = {{UTZ|16:00|-3}}
| team1 = [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]] {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}}
| score = 3–1
| team2 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| goals1 = 
*[[Giorgian de Arrascaeta|De Arrascaeta]] {{goal|11}}
*[[Gabriel Barbosa]] {{goal|39||74}}
| goals2 = 
*[[Alan Kardec]] {{goal|79}}
| stadium = [[Maracanã Stadium|Maracanã]], [[Rio de Janeiro]]
| attendance = 67,459<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.terra.com.br/esportes/futebol/copa-do-brasil/flamengo-vence-o-atletico-mg-por-3-a-1-no-primeiro-jogo-da-decisao-da-copa-do-brasil,ce8eb0d9b8e2ffba5fbf3c8df1ba6d3fodoz2ysj.html |title=Flamengo vence o Atlético-MG por 3 a 1 no primeiro jogo da decisão da Copa do Brasil |publisher=[[Terra (company)|Terra]] |language=pt-br |access-date=3 November 2024}}</ref>
| referee = Rafael Rodrigo Klein ([[Federação Gaúcha de Futebol|Rio Grande do Sul]])
| report = https://conteudo.cbf.com.br/sumulas/2024/424121se.pdf
}}
{{Football box
| date = {{Start date|2024|11|10|df=y}}
| time = {{UTZ|16:00|-3}}
| team1 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}}
| score = 0–1
| team2 = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
| goals1 = 
| goals2 = *[[Gonzalo Plata|Plata]] {{goal|82}}
| stadium = [[Arena MRV]], [[Belo Horizonte]]
| attendance = 44,876
| referee = [[Raphael Claus]] ([[Federação Paulista de Futebol|São Paulo]])
| report = 
}}
{{winners||Copa do Brasil<br>2024 champions|[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]|5th}}

== Top goalscorers ==
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
!Rank
!Player 
!Team 
!Goals <ref>{{Cite web |title=Tabela e Jogos da Copa do Brasil 2024 |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/ |access-date=2024-08-24 |website=ge |language=pt-br |archive-date=2024-08-23 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20240823130136/https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
|-
|1
| align="left" |{{flagicon|ARG}} [[Pablo Vegetti]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|7
|-
| rowspan="2" |2
| align="left" |{{flagicon|URU}} [[Emiliano Rodríguez (footballer)|Emiliano Rodríguez]]
|align=left|{{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]
| rowspan="2" |4
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|ECU}} [[Enner Valencia]]
|align=left|{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[SC Internacional|Internacional]]
|-
| rowspan="9" |3
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Alex Sandro (footballer, born 1995)|Alex Sandro]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Botafogo Futebol Clube (SP)|Botafogo-SP]]
| rowspan="9" |3
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|PAR}} [[Ángel Romero (footballer)|Ángel Romero]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} Braga
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Pará}} [[Águia de Marabá Futebol Clube|Águia de Marabá]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Luan Dias]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Esporte Clube Água Santa|Água Santa]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Cauly]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Lucas Piton]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Lucas Barbosa (footballer, born 2001)|Lucas Barbosa]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gilberto (footballer, born 1989)|Gilberto]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
|-
| align="left" |{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Pedro (footballer, born 1997)|Pedro]]
| align="left" |{{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|}
===Team of the tournament===
{| class="wikitable"
!Position
!Player
!Team
|-
|align=center|Goalkeeper
|{{flagicon|ARG}} [[Agustín Rossi (footballer)|Agustín Rossi]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|align=center rowspan=4|Defenders
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Wesley França]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Léo Ortiz]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[André Ramalho]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Guilherme Arana]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
|-
| rowspan="4" align="center" |Midfielders
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gustavo Scarpa]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gerson (footballer, born 1997)|Gerson]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|CHI}} [[Erick Pulgar]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|URU}} [[Giorgian de Arrascaeta]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
| rowspan="2" align="center" |Forwards
|{{flagicon|ARG}} [[Pablo Vegetti]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gabriel Barbosa]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|}

== References ==
{{Reflist}}

{{Copa do Brasil}}
{{2024 in Brazilian football}}
{{2024 in South American football (CONMEBOL)}}

[[Category:2024 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons]]
[[Category:2024 Copa do Brasil]]
